name: Strawberry Lemondrift Pie (Gfdm86a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stem the strawberries and chill.
2. Combine milk and gelatin in a quart saucepan; set aside for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in sugar until dissolved.
4. Add the grated lemon peel and juice, stirring to combine.
5. Cool to room temperature, then chill until syrupy (about 15 minutes).
6. Whip cream until stiff peaks form.
7. Fold the gelatin mixture into the whipped cream.
8. Spoon the filling into the pie shell and mound it slightly.
9. Halve the strawberries and cover the filling with them.
10. Chill until firm, at least 2 hours before serving.
11. Dust lightly with powdered sugar just before serving.
